theory.canonical_statement: ID 447 establishes the protocol for verifying quantum coherence times within the operating generator. Ramsey interferometry is used to characterize the decoherence rates of the extracted information states. A signature of a successful Trawin Zero Point coupling is the observation of coherence times exceeding thermal predictions by a factor of 1000, confirming the scale invariant topological protection of the channels. Stability Check: Ensures the up refresh rate is not disrupting the state superpositions. Scale Invariance: Confirms that quantum correlations are being maintained independent of temporal scaling.
